ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "average_fare" REAL /* Average fare for rides in the city */,
  "total_rides" INTEGER /* Total number of rides completed in the city */,
  "total_fares" REAL /* Total amount of fares collected in the city */,
  "driver_count" INTEGER /* Number of active drivers in the city */,
  "city_type" TEXT /* Type of city (e.g., Urban, Suburban) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of rides in the city */,
  "peak_hours" TEXT /* Peak hours for rides in the city */,
  "avg_driver_response_time" REAL /* Average time it takes for drivers to accept a ride request in the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the driver operates */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the driver based on user feedback */,
  "total_rides" INTEGER /* Total number of rides completed by the driver */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the driver joined the service */,
  "last_active_date" TEXT /* Last date the driver was active */,
  "vehicle_make" TEXT /* Make of the driver's vehicle */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the driver's vehicle */,
  "vehicle_year" INTEGER /* Year of the driver's vehicle */,
  "vehicle_license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the driver's vehicle */,
  "total_earnings" REAL /* Total earnings of the driver */,
  "avg_ride_duration" REAL /* Average duration of rides completed by the driver */,
  "avg_ride_distance" REAL /* Average distance of rides completed by the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fares" (
  "fare_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fare record */,
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ride associated with this fare */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the ride took place */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount charged for the ride */,
  "fare_date" TEXT /* Date of the fare transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who paid the fare */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "promo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to any promotional codes used */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount applied */,
  "final_amount" REAL /* Final amount paid after discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fare_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fares_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fares_promo_id FOREIGN KEY ("promo_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rides" (
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ride */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver who completed the ride */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the ride took place */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the ride */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the ride */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance covered during the ride (in miles) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who booked the ride */,
  "pickup_location" TEXT /* Pickup location of the ride */,
  "dropoff_location" TEXT /* Dropoff location of the ride */,
  "estimated_time" REAL /* Estimated time of the ride */,
  "actual_time" REAL /* Actual time taken for the ride */,
  "estimated_distance" REAL /* Estimated distance of the ride */,
  "actual_distance" REAL /* Actual distance covered during the ride */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ride */,
  "reason_for_cancellation" TEXT /* Reason for cancellation if the ride was cancelled */,
  "driver_response_time" REAL /* Time it took for the driver to accept the ride request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ride_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the user is registered in */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the service */,
  "last_active_date" TEXT /* Last date the user was active */,
  "total_rides" INTEGER /* Total number of rides taken by the user */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the user */,
  "avg_rating_given" REAL /* Average rating given by the user */,
  "avg_rating_received" REAL /* Average rating received by the user */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the user */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* Referral code of the user */,
  "referred_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who referred this user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_referred_by FOREIGN KEY ("referred_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ride_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ride associated with this feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing the feedback */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user for the ride */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "usefulness" TEXT /* How useful the user found the feedback */,
  "responded_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the support staff who responded to the feedback */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time it took to respond to the feedback */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ride_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ride_feedback_ride_id FOREIGN KEY ("ride_id") REFERENCES rides ("ride_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city for which the metric is calculated */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver for which the metric is calculated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user for which the metric is calculated */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotional campaign */,
  "promo_code" TEXT /* Code used to claim the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Percentage discount offered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "min_ride_amount" REAL /* Minimum amount a ride must be to qualify for the promotion */,
  "max_ride_amount" REAL /* Maximum amount a ride can be to qualify for the promotion */,
  "usage_limit_per_user" INTEGER /* Maximum number of times a user can use the promotion */,
  "total_usage" INTEGER /* Total number of times the promotion has been used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promo_id")
)
